policy.sameSegment: Beaches in the same curated shoreline segment should render the same visible exposure level unless a verified local morphology or wind-sport exception locks a stricter level.
policy.confidence: Segment propagation may support map-color consistency and medium review, but it never creates high confidence by itself.

segments.notes: Agios Petros, Chrysi Ammos, Kypri, and Agios Kyprianos sit on the same practical west/southwest Gavrio-Batsi beach-front.
Batsi and Kolona are adjacent Batsi-bay records with similar southwest-facing behavior; popularity and amenities remain separate.
Vitali and Gides are very close north/east Andros records with near-identical east-facing shoreline behavior.
Kalamitsi and Kaminaki are adjacent northwest Andros records with similar northwest-facing exposure.
Megala Peza and Mikra Peza are adjacent northern-western records with matching northwest-facing shoreline behavior.
Platanistos and Rozos are neighboring north-coast records; access remains separate and boat-only records must not become top picks.
Kourtali and Felos are close west-coast records with similar west-facing exposure behavior.
